Arm Your Reps →
Sales Enablement

Sales Enablement Consulting: Give Your Reps
What They Actually Need to Close.

Sales enablement isn't a content library. It's the system that makes every rep consistently effective — regardless of how long they've been on the team or how well they know your product.

Arm Your Reps → How to Use Claude for Sales
The Problem

What Happens When
Enablement Doesn't Exist.

Most sales teams are losing deals they should win — not because reps aren't talented, but because they don't have the right materials at the right moment.

Reps wing demos and discovery calls
Every rep runs the demo differently. Your best rep knows the right questions. Your newest rep is still figuring out the product. The customer experience is inconsistent and the outcome is unpredictable.
Messaging varies by rep — and by day
What your reps say about your product doesn't match what marketing says. It doesn't even match what other reps say. Prospects are confused. Deals slow down because the story keeps changing.
Competitive intel is stale or nonexistent
A prospect asks "how are you different from Competitor X?" and your rep fumbles. They either undersell your advantages or get defensive. A battlecard that takes 3 minutes to read would have won that conversation.
Proposals take 4 hours to write and still lose
Your reps are spending half their week writing proposals from scratch. The proposals don't have a consistent format, they rarely reference the prospect's specific pain, and they often arrive late because they took so long to write.
New reps take 6 months to ramp
Onboarding is "shadow a senior rep for 2 weeks and figure it out." There's no documented playbook. No call library. No structured path from onboarding to first deal. The institutional knowledge lives in people's heads and walks out the door when they leave.
What We Build

The Sales Enablement System
That Makes Reps Effective.

Six deliverables. Built in 60 days. Every one of them is something a rep can open and use on their next call.

01
Competitive Battlecards
One-page cards for your top 5–8 competitors. What they're strong at, where they're weak, what your prospects are hearing from them, and the specific responses that win. Updated quarterly. Built to be pulled up during a call, not read the night before.
02
Sales Playbook
The full game plan: ICP definition, discovery questions that surface real pain, demo structure by use case, follow-up cadence, and stage-exit criteria. Specific enough to train a new rep. Flexible enough for a senior rep to add their own style.
03
Objection Handling Library
Your 20 most common objections, documented with context and response frameworks. Not scripts — frameworks. "We're happy with our current vendor." "The timing isn't right." "We need to think about it." Each one handled with honesty, not pressure.
04
Claude-Powered Proposal System
A custom Claude workflow that takes your discovery notes and generates a personalized proposal draft in under 10 minutes. Your reps fill in what they learned on the call. Claude handles the writing. Proposals that took 4 hours now take 30 minutes — and they're better.
05
New Rep Onboarding Track
A structured 30-60-90 day ramp plan with milestones, a call shadow library, self-certification checkpoints, and the materials to get from "first day" to "first deal" without depending on a senior rep to babysit them the whole way.
06
Messaging Architecture
Consistent language for your positioning, differentiators, and value props — across every rep, every channel, and every stage of the sale. What you say in a cold email, on a discovery call, and in a proposal should tell the same coherent story.
AI-Native Sales Enablement

Claude Inside Your
Sales Motion.

The best sales enablement in 2025 is AI-native — not because it's trendy, but because it's the only way to keep materials current and proposals personalized at scale.

Proposal Generation
30-Minute Custom Proposals
Rep fills in discovery notes. Claude drafts a proposal customized to that prospect's specific situation, in your voice, with your standard structure. Reviewed and sent in 30 minutes. Used to take half a day.
Battlecard Updates
Competitive Intel That Stays Current
Claude monitors competitor positioning changes and flags when battlecards need updating. You're not relying on a quarterly manual review — you're reacting to what your competitors are actually saying right now.
Call Prep
Account Research in 5 Minutes
Custom Claude workflow that takes a company name and generates a tailored call prep brief — company context, likely pain points, relevant case studies, and suggested discovery questions. Reps show up knowing the account.
Objection Coaching
Real-Time Objection Help
A Claude assistant reps can query mid-prep: "How do I respond when a prospect says our price is 30% higher than [Competitor]?" Gets them the right response in seconds, not a trip to the enablement wiki.
How to Use Claude for Sales →
Who This Is For

Sales Enablement Is Right
for You If...

Situation A
You're adding headcount
Hiring 2–3 new reps this year. Every month of slow ramp is revenue you're not making. Enablement cuts ramp time by 30–40% and makes every dollar of headcount work harder.
Situation B
Your top rep is carrying everyone
One rep is 2x everyone else's quota. The difference isn't talent — it's knowledge that lives in their head. Enablement codifies what they know and distributes it to the whole team.
Situation C
Win rate is inconsistent across reps
Same ICP, same product, very different close rates. When reps are performing 2–3x differently against similar opportunities, it's a process and materials problem — not a talent problem.
Fractional CMO → Fractional CRO → All Services →
The Timeline

60 Days to a Fully
Enabled Sales Team.

Week 1–2
Discovery & Audit
Call recordings reviewed, top reps interviewed, competitor intelligence gathered, existing materials audited. We learn your sales motion before we build anything.
Week 3–6
Build & Review
All six deliverables built in parallel, reviewed with your team, and iterated based on feedback. Rep testing is built into this phase — materials get stress-tested before they go live.
Week 7–8
Launch & Train
Team training sessions, manager enablement, Claude workflow setup and testing. You get a live library and the training to use it — not a Google Drive folder that gets ignored.
Get in Touch

Give Your Reps What
They Need to Close.

Tell us where your sales team is inconsistent. We'll tell you what an enablement engagement would look like and where you'd see results first.

We'll be in touch.

Expect a response within one business day. If you'd like to move faster, book directly at calendar.app.google.
